title: Implement Windows Server IaaS VM Identity
summary: After completing this learning path, you’ll know how to implement identity in Azure. You’ll be able to extend an existing on-premises Active Directory identity service into Azure.

sections.title: Implement Windows Server IaaS VM Identity
sections.summary: After completing this learning path, you’ll know how to implement identity in Azure. You’ll be able to extend an existing on-premises Active Directory identity service into Azure.

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement Windows Server IaaS VM Identity
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement Windows Server IaaS VM Identity**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
